title: erodium cicutarium f. primulaceum
intro: Erodium cicutarium f. primulaceum, also known as the red-stemmed storksbill or pink-stemmed storksbill, is a plant species that belongs to the geranium family and is characterized by its pink or red flowers and pink or red stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Erodium cicutarium f. primulaceum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and it has also been used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
